'''Hyrol Preen Beta''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Its populace was [[Pacification of Hyrol Preen Beta|wiped out]] by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]] and [[ZQ Infantry Support Unit|ZQ infantry droids]] because of suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity. A [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], [[Johin]], brought news of the devastation.
